questions.question: Consider a randomized block design with 4 blocks and 6 treatments. If the treatment effect is significant, what does it imply about the design?

A randomized block design is used to study the effect of 3 different fertilizers on the yield of a crop. The 3 blocks are made up of 4 replicates each. What is the primary advantage of using a randomized block design in this case?
questions.hint: Reducing the effect of environmental factors

questions.question: In a randomized block design with 2 blocks and 4 treatments, if the treatment effect is not significant, what can be concluded about the design?
